# SolutionRunFailed

> Emitted when a solution run fails

**Channel:** redis
  
**Topic:** `solution-run-failed`

## Payload

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| runId | string | yes | - |
| solutionId | string | yes | - |
| error | string | yes | - |
| organizationId | string | yes | - |

## Published By

- Trigger: `manual`

## Subscriber

- **Handler:** `dispatchAlert`
- **Retry:** max 3 attempts (exponential)
